title: polygala oxyphylla var. salicina
intro: Polygala oxyphylla var. salicina, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a type of plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family, native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polygala oxyphylla var. salicina include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of insomnia, restlessness, and other sleep-related disorders.
